title: PakBites - Premium Food Hub
description: PakBites is a production-grade, full-stack food ordering platform designed for high-traffic restaurant operations. It solves the complexity of real-time menu management and secure transaction processing with a focus on premium aesthetics and performance.
ui_features: Vibrant dark-mode-first aesthetic with glassmorphism effects
Liquid transitions using Framer Motion
Fully responsive architecture for mobile and desktop
Interactive data visualizations for admin analytics

title: Facebook Lite - Social Hub
description: A high-performance social networking platform optimized for speed and engagement. It features an advanced media streaming engine for Reels and a real-time notification system, mimicking the core experiences of modern social giants.
ui_features: Native-feeling mobile transitions for Reels and Stories
Auditory feedback on social interactions (likes/comments)
Intersection-aware auto-play engine for video content
Dynamic aspect-ratio enforcement for visual stability

title: Scholarly - Learning System
description: Scholarly LMS is an enterprise-grade education management platform that digitizes the entire academic workflow. It handles multi-role hierarchies, real-time messaging, and comprehensive data tracking for modern educational institutions.
ui_features: Professional dashboard layouts using Ant Design components
Real-time live notification stream using WebSockets
Complex form handling for course and user creation
Interactive academic progress charts

title: Uber Mobility Clone
description: A sophisticated ride-hailing application that replicates the core functionality of Uber. It integrates real-time mapping, complex fare calculation algorithms, and a seamless matching system between captains and riders.
ui_features: Real-time vehicle movement simulation on maps
Floating search bars and predictive address input
Dynamic price estimation UI
Smooth mobile-first navigation flow

title: Airbnb Rental Hub
description: Airbnb Clone is a comprehensive travel and hospitality marketplace. It enables users to discover unique stays, manage complex booking calendars, and provides hosts with a robust toolkit to manage their property listings.
ui_features: Modern card layouts with multi-image carousels
Advanced filtering system for amenities and price
Interactive property location maps
Clean, minimalist design following Airbnb's design system

title: Ademy - Knowledge E-Learning
description: Ademy is a premium e-learning marketplace that bridge the gap between instructors and students. It features a secure payment gateway for course purchases, a dedicated video player for lessons, and automated progress tracking.
ui_features: Seamless course playback experience
Fluid checkout animations
Optimized course discovery interface
Professional instructor dashboards

title: MiniURL - Link Analytics
description: A high-efficiency microservice designed for link management. It provides instant URL shortening, custom brand-able aliases, and real-time click tracking with QR code integration.
ui_features: Ultra-minimalist input-first design
Instant copy-to-clipboard feedback
Modern simplified chart visualizations
Live preview for generated QR codes

title: The Rhythm Room
description: A Next.js site for music courses, events, blogs and galleries. Built with a mobile-first responsive design and server-rendered pages for SEO.
ui_features: Responsive hero and course listings
Event gallery with images
Static + dynamic Next.js pages
Mobile-first navigation flow

title: Quizee
description: An interactive flashcard and study application inspired by Quizlet. Built with React and Vite, Quizee helps students master any subject through beautifully designed flashcards, dynamic carousels, and an intuitive learning experience.
ui_features: Interactive flashcard browsing system
Dynamic carousel for featured topics
Responsive mobile-first design
Pagination for large study sets
Smooth animations and transitions
Study sets across multiple subjects (Languages, Science, History)

title: Pookie Games
description: A modern, high-performance mini-games hub featuring a collection of classic arcade and logic games. Starting with a sleek Tic-Tac-Toe implementation, Pookie Games focuses on smooth state management, responsive bento-grid layouts, and a seamless user experience.
ui_features: Interactive Bento-style dashboard
Dynamic game loading system via JSON configuration
Responsive grid layout (Col-span 2 for featured games)
Smooth page transitions with React Router
Hover-responsive game cards with dynamic overlays
Fully optimized for mobile and desktop gameplay

title: shopyee
description: A sophisticated platform merging a modern fashion e-commerce experience with curated travel and lifestyle guides. shopyee provides a seamless transition from exploring the latest trends in Men’s, Women’s, and Junior’s apparel to discovering hand-picked global travel destinations through an editorial-style interface.
ui_features: Dynamic Category-driven Navigation System
Curated Editorial Travel Experiences
Real-time Country Data Integration via REST API
Modern Tailwind CSS v4 Fluid Design Language
Responsive Product and Discovery Grids
Seamless Page Transitions with React Router 7

title: Inventory-MS
description: A professional-grade Inventory Management System engineered for seamless stock tracking and business efficiency. InventoryMS features a high-performance dashboard, full product and category life-cycle management, and an advanced historical transaction engine, all delivered through a premium enterprise-level interface with zero backend dependency.
ui_features: Enterprise-grade Dashboard with Real-time Metrics
Advanced Product CRUD with Category Relationships
Sophisticated Manual Stock Adjustment Module
Comprehensive Transaction Logging & Filtering System
Premium Slate-themed Sidebar Navigation
Built-in System Reset and Local Data Clearing

title: Dribbble-Clone
description: A high-fidelity, full-stack Dribbble clone engineered for designers and creatives to showcase their work in a premium ecosystem. Built with Next.js 15+ and Tailwind CSS 4, it features a high-performance grid layout, secure authentication via NextAuth, and seamless media handling through Cloudinary. The application provides a state-of-the-art user experience with responsive design, real-time image processing, and a robust project management system.
ui_features: High-Performance Design Grid with Premium Hover States
Dynamic Interaction Engine (Like, Save, View Count Tracking)
Advanced Search Architecture with Popular Tag Suggestions
Secure Multi-factor Authentication & Email Verification
Sophisticated Project Upload & Management Module
Personalized Creative Profiles with Level-based Badging
Responsive Dark-Themed Glassmorphism Interface

title: GitLens
description: A high-performance GitHub profile visualizer and analyzer designed to give developers deep insights into open-source contributions. GitLens features real-time profile fetching, smart repository analytics, activity level tracking, and an interactive contribution heat-map, all delivered via a clean, modern interface.
ui_features: Dynamic GitHub Profile Search Interface
Smart Insights Module (Language, Stars & Activity)
Interactive Contribution Heat-map Visualization
Comprehensive Repository List with Metadata
Real-time Statistic Cards (Followers, Following, Repos)
Premium Minimalist UI with Slate & Blue Accents

title: EChat
description: EChat is a premium, high-performance AI-powered chat application designed to provide a seamless conversational experience. Built with React 19 and Vite, it integrates the Google Gemini Flash API for intelligent real-time responses. The platform features secure Clerk authentication, dynamic message streaming, and a mobile-first responsive design, all wrapped in a sleek, minimalist UI.
ui_features: Clean AI Chat Interface with Instant Semantic Responses
Robust User Authentication & Profile Management via Clerk
Dynamic Typing Indicators & Real-time Message Rendering
Context-Aware Conversation History & New Chat Logic
Mobile-First Responsive Layout with Optimized Layout Shift
Premium Minimalist Aesthetic with Zinc & Slate Accents

title: Guardly
description: A high-performance, military-grade password management solution designed for ultimate security and ease of use. Guardly features a zero-knowledge architecture, smart autofill capabilities, and a sleek modern interface to securely manage both digital credentials and financial wallets across all devices.
ui_features: Interactive Dashboard with Motion-enhanced Transitions
Secure Credentials Vault with Real-time CRUD Operations
Stored Wallets Module for Credit Card Management
Zero-Knowledge Architecture UI Visualization
Responsive Grid Layout with High-Fidelity Iconography
Premium Minimalist UI with Slate, Blue & Green Accents

title: SonicStream
description: A high-performance music streaming platform inspired by Spotify. SonicStream leverages the Spotify Web API to deliver real-time track searches, seamless playback, and personalized playlist management within a stunning, glassmorphic interface designed for both desktop and mobile users.
ui_features: Real-time Music Playback with Interactive Seek Bar
Dynamic Search Engine for Artists, Albums, and Tracks
Glassmorphic Dashboard with Fluid Motion Transitions
Personalized Library and Playlist Management System
Responsive Grid Layout for Seamless Cross-Device Experience
Premium UI with Deep Obsidian, Emerald, and Slate Accents

title: BookSphere
description: A feature-rich digital bookstore and library management platform designed for a seamless reading discovery experience. BookSphere features dynamic book sliders, real-time catalog management via Supabase, advanced category filtering, and a responsive shopping interface, all brought to life with smooth Framer Motion animations.
ui_features: Dynamic Book Discovery Slider & Hero Sections
Real-time Database Integration for Catalog & Inventory
Advanced Product Filtering & Shop Interface
Interactive Book Details with Metadata Showcasing
Comprehensive User Authentication System (Login/SignUp)
Premium Minimalist UI with Elegant Typography & Transitions

title: Instagram-Lite
description: A high-performance, pixel-perfect Instagram replication engineered for seamless social interaction. Built with Next.js 16 and Tailwind CSS 4, it features a responsive glassmorphic UI, secure authentication via NextAuth, and a scalable MongoDB backend. The application delivers a premium user experience with real-time post interactions, dynamic route grouping, and sophisticated server-side rendering for optimal performance.
ui_features: Pixel-Perfect Instagram UI with Modern Glassmorphism
Secure Authentication Flow with Route Protection
Dynamic Feed Architecture with Optimized Layout Shifting
Seamless Post Interactions (Like, Comment, Save functionality)
Advanced User Profiles with Follower/Following Logic
High-Performance Server Actions for Real-time Data Handling
Responsive Navigation System (Sidebar & Bottom Bar)

title: Aventine OS - macOS Portfolio
description: A premium, high-performance macOS-inspired portfolio engineered to replicate a full desktop environment within the browser. Built with Next.js 16 and Tailwind CSS 4, it features a robust custom window management system, a dynamic dock with magnification effects, and an integrated wallpaper engine. The application delivers a pixel-perfect Apple-style UI with fluid Framer Motion animations and intelligent responsive adaptation, transitioning seamlessly from a multi-window desktop OS to a simplified iOS-like mobile interface.
ui_features: Pixel-Perfect macOS Desktop UI with Sophisticated Glassmorphism
Dynamic Dock System with Intelligent Icon Magnification Effects
Robust Window Manager with Drag, Resize, Focus, and Fullscreen Logic
Authentic Apple-Style Boot Sequence and Fluid System Animations
Integrated Wallpaper Engine for Real-Time UI Customization
Adaptive Design Language (Full-OS Desktop to iOS-styled Mobile UI)
Suite of Interactive Apps (About, Projects, Resume, Services, Settings)

title: Trimly - Smart URL Shortener
description: A high-performance URL shortener and comprehensive analytics platform engineered for speed and deep visitor insights. Built with Next.js 16 and Tailwind CSS 4, it features instant link shortening, secure multi-factor authentication, and an advanced tracking engine that captures detailed geolocation, device specifications, and browser data. The application provides a seamless, emerald-themed administration dashboard for managing shortened links with real-time data persistence through MongoDB.
ui_features: One-Click High-Performance URL Shortening System
Advanced Visitor Analytics Dashboard (Geo, Device, Browser Tracking)
Secure Multi-Factor Authentication with Email Verification
Real-Time Link Management & Interaction History Persistence
High-Fidelity Responsive Emerald Design System
Intelligent Bot Detection & Security Filtering Logic
Sophisticated Geolocation Integration via ipinfo.io

title: SmartBank
description: A sophisticated full-stack online banking ecosystem engineered for secure and seamless financial management. Built with Next.js 16 and Tailwind CSS 4, it features a dual-entry ledger system, real-time transaction processing, and a robust security architecture including OTP verification and account lockout protection. The platform empowers users with intuitive money transfers and loan applications while providing administrators with comprehensive analytical oversight.
ui_features: Dynamic Banking Dashboard with Real-time Balance Tracking
Secure Money Transfer System with Email Notifications & Idempotency
Multi-step Authentication with OTP Verification & Account Lockout
Comprehensive Loan Lifecycle (Request, Admin Approval, Repayment)
Advanced Admin Suite for User Monitoring and Platform Oversight
Modern Glassmorphic UI with Dark/Light Mode Persistence
High-Performance Dual-Entry Ledger for Transactional Integrity
